scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/website-analyser run build && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/website-analyser run dev"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
